title: French Eastern Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and colorful skewer dish combining the tastes of the East with the elegance of French cuisine.

ingredients.name: chicken
ingredients.notes: Boneless and skinless chicken breast or thighs

ingredients.name: eastern
ingredients.notes: Middle Eastern spice blend (e.g., cumin, coriander, turmeric)

ingredients.name: piquant
ingredients.notes: A pinch of cayenne pepper or red pepper flakes

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: Metal or bamboo skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the chicken, eastern spice blend, piquant, and middle Eastern herbs.
Thread the chicken mixture onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with additional herbs if desired.
